senses.gloss: to cover, to hide, to screen; to veil
to protect, to shield, to guard, to safeguard; to shelter
to protect, to shield, to guard, to safeguard; to shelter; to marry off (a girl or a young woman) (as in order to protect her from sin)
to cover up, to hide, to screen; to enveil

examples.text: فَجَعَلَ ٱبْنُ ٱلزُّبَيْرِ أَعْمِدَةً فَسَتَّرَ عَلَيْهَا ٱلسُّتُور حَتَّى ٱرْتَفَعَ بِنَاؤُهُ
examples.english: And Ibn Az-Zubayr made pillars and covered them with curtains to further the building’s erection.

senses.gloss: to protect, to shield, to guard, to safeguard; to shelter
to protect, to shield, to guard, to safeguard; to shelter; to marry off (a girl or a young woman) (as in order to protect her from sin)
a covering or barrier that shelters and protects or restricts

examples.english: Allah exposed the man [and his deeds]. (literally "Allah tore the man's cover.")

senses.gloss: a covering or barrier that shelters and protects or restricts; curtain, drape

examples.text: فَجَعَلَ ٱبْنُ ٱلزُّبَيْرِ أَعْمِدَةً فَسَتَّرَ عَلَيْهَا ٱلسُّتُورَ حَتَّى ٱرْتَفَعَ بِنَاؤُهُ
examples.english: And Ibn Az-Zubayr made pillars and covered them up with curtains to further the building’s erection.

senses.gloss: a covering or barrier that shelters and protects or restricts; shame, scruple; compunction
